TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_lmiquy, title = lmiquy, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/lmiquy} }

S.FORM: == lmiquy == lmiquy ga gluw naq k'man. blaq balay niqun kacing qu lmiquy hiya'. pptzyuwaw na lmiquy Tayal srara hya' ga, mutuw naha galun toyu' niya', ru shap naha'sa qin'apan g'nux, gi aki' ini' kznga' hmbku' qu g'nux ma.

== lmiquy == lmiquy ga gluw naq k'man. blaq balay niqun kacing qu lmiquy hiya'. pptzyuwaw na lmiquy Tayal srara hya' ga, mutuw naha galun toyu' niya', ru shap naha'sa qin'apan g'nux, gi aki' ini' kznga' hmbku' qu g'nux ma.
S.PHON: == lmiquj == lmiquj ɣa ɣluw naq kʔman. βlaq βalaj niqun kaʦ~ʨiŋ qu lmiquj ħijaʔ. pptzjuwaw na lmiquj tajal s~ɕrara ħjaʔ ɣa, mutuw naħa ɣalun tojuʔ nijaʔ, ru s~ɕħap naħaʔs~ɕa qinʔapan ɣʔnux, ɣi akiʔ iniʔ kzŋaʔ ħmβkuʔ qu ɣʔnux ma.
